name: Golden Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the corn meal, flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the milk, egg, and vegetable shortening.
3. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
4. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees F (220 degrees C).
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the bread comes out clean and lightly browned.
